title: Create meetings that works for you with Meetee`s AI- powered assistant

posts.author: chen.midany (chen midany)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are launching our app on Monday - to help managers create smart meeting summaries with Meetee’s AI-powered assistant.

Start by installing this:

auth.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

And then add the app view: View drop-down > Add View > App’s > Account Apps > Meeting Summary by Meetee > Add.

All you need is to just start summarizing your meeting like this:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OMZ7ZwtRBdo&feature=youtu.be

Let me know for any question
@chen.midany

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @chen.midany - welcome!!

Thank you so much for posting - this looks great! Look forward to other users trying this out.

-Daniel
